response.original_title: Disney+ insider: Rock 'n' Roller Coaster  Starring The Muppets
response.overview: Go behind the scenes of the all-new Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Starring The Muppets at Disney's Hollywood Studios at Walt Disney World Resort in Florida. John Stamos, joined by "The Muppets" Studio Creative Director Dani Iglesias, gets an inside look at the reimagined attraction, packed with Muppet humor, music, and hidden details. Along the way, they meet Kermit the Frog, plus Animal and Sergeant Floyd Pepper from The Electric Mayhem as they reveal how the coaster's story, energy, and soundtrack come together. Experience a wild, music-fueled adventure that blends thrills, comedy, and classic Muppet charm. Now open at Disney's Hollywood Studios.
response.title: Disney+ insider: Rock 'n' Roller Coaster  Starring The Muppets
